title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
desc: A man, kicked out of his house, begins to work as an adult film actor in Thailand. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a girl from a conservative family.

title: Fukrey 3

title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
desc: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.

title: Spin State
desc: An afflicted private investigator examines a youthful scientist's residence.

title: Agent Vinod
desc: On a mission to decipher a colleague's dying message, RAW agent Vinod travels across different countries and uncovers a dangerous conspiracy against India.

title: Chandu Champion
desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
desc: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Sky Force
desc: Brave heroes embark on a quest for truth as India and Pakistan enter an airstrike war that threatens to pose deadly consequences.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
desc: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Aitraaz
desc: When a company chairman's trophy wife stirs up a storm in a happily married employee's life, the tumultuous winds drag all of them into an intense courtroom showdown.

title: Jai Ho
desc: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

title: Singh Is Kinng
desc: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.
